source_of_truth.note: Always verify against GitHub code, branch, commit, diff and tests. This file is a snapshot, not a source of truth.

operational_north.plan: Plano Global v4.2 (incorpora Radar de Inteligência Institucional)
operational_north.current_mode: Frente Fiscal v1, Central de Despesas do Diretor, Relação de Bens Adquiridos (Anexo II) e Estorno GAD 100% entregues e deploiaveis em produção.

recent_pull_requests.title: feat: Painel de Auditoria de Despesas e Ação de Estorno no GAD
feat: Central de Despesas e download da Relação de Bens (Anexo II) no Portal do Diretor
feat: Frente Fiscal v1 — Spike de Aquisição Fiscal Multicanal
docs(manual): refinar manual institucional com conformidade de seguranca e saneamento de termos

delivered_state.frente_fiscal_v1_acquisition: delivered in commit 02e198b; Frente Fiscal split-screen panel added under /fiscal with client-side XML DOMParser (NF-e/NFS-e), 44-digit key checksum (Modulo 11) validator with automatic CNPJ extraction, CSS laser scanning OCR sandbox simulator for PDFs/images, and transactional public.homologar_despesa_fiscal Supabase RPC with sandbox localStorage fallback.
delivered_state.relacao_bens_anexo_ii: delivered in commit e9fc22b; library generateRelacaoBens.ts added using ExcelJS to programmatically compile and style the official Bens Adquiridos list from capital despesas, complete with institutional headers and signatures, featuring reactive warning rows when no items exist.
delivered_state.portal_diretor_real_time_despesas: delivered in commit e9fc22b; Portal do Diretor got a beautiful real-time Notas Fiscais extrato listing all audited invoices with dates, formatted CNPJ, values, and HSL Custeio vs Capital badges. Mapped Anexo II to functional download button using ExcelJS dynamic code splitting.
delivered_state.gad_auditoria_estorno: delivered in commit 4345c37; added Despesas card inside /escolas/:id administrative panel allowing operators/admins to audit and safely delete/reconcile despesas fiscais dynamically using the public.estornar_despesa_fiscal RPC with optimistic query invalidations.
delivered_state.security_center_panel: delivered in commit 87263bd; custom SecurityCenterPanel component added to /configuracoes containing interactive PostgreSQL RLS scanner, simulated Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) OTP toggle with sonner toasts, and styled terminal logs showing database audit triggers mutations.
delivered_state.responsividade_mobile_refinement: delivered in commit 24d775f; responsive table columns in HistoricoGeracoes.tsx hiding less critical metadata on md/sm viewports, and flex-col sm:flex-row stackable document panels in PortalDiretor.tsx preventing text overlap on smaller devices
delivered_state.painel_visual_polish: delivered in PR #79; 10 refinements visually sóbrias across all cards
delivered_state.admin_roles_ui: delivered in PR #75 (Marco 6B v0); /configuracoes user list and role management
delivered_state.geracao_em_lote_163_demonstrativos: delivered in PR #73; generateDemonstrativosLote + batch processing control

next_priority.current_pr: Nenhum (PR de atualização tecnológica entregue e integrado em bd750fc).
next_priority.immediate_next_step: Avançar para o Marco 11 (Relação de Bens Adquiridos via ExcelJS) ou Sub-Marco 6B (audit_logs de mutações sensíveis).
smoke_checklist: Verificar efeitos 3D parallax no /dashboard ao passar o mouse
Validar responsividade via Container Queries no modal ao redimensionar
Realizar testes e validações automatizadas pós-upgrade

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data (Opção B)
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Remove the BASE sheet from generated individual workbooks if present
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
